overall.description: A slow, atmospheric first-person exploration alongside a weathered wooden house covered in dense ivy, set in a fog-shrouded forest at night. The footage is clearly from a horror video game, featuring cinematic low-lighting, volumetric fog, and bare autumn trees barely visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior wall of abandoned wooden house in foggy forest

agents.ego_description: slowly walking alongside the exterior wall of a weathered wooden house, observing the ivy-covered siding and upper windows through the dense fog

entered.detail: aged wooden siding with horizontal planks covered in dark green ivy vines
dark shingled roof with prominent overhang visible above the wall
small white-framed window set into the sloped roof section
bare autumn trees barely visible through thick gray fog
leafless twisted branches reaching into the frame from the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving slowly alongside the right wall of a weathered wooden house in a dense foggy forest at night. The upper portion of the house is visible, including a steep roof overhang and a dormer window, while bare tree branches loom through the mist on the left. The atmosphere is still and silent, with low visibility due to heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior wall of abandoned wooden house in foggy forest

events.description: camera moves past the roofline, transitioning view from upper dormer window to ground floor windows

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk alongside the house wall, now focusing on the ground floor windows and vertical drainpipe

entered.detail: three white-framed rectangular windows at ground level with dark interiors
vertical dark metal drainage pipe running down the wall between windows

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues moving forward, the roof overhang and dormer window exit the frame, revealing the ground floor of the house with three white-framed windows and a vertical drainpipe. The foggy forest remains visible on the left, with bare branches now appearing closer to the camera. The movement remains steady and slow, maintaining the eerie, atmospheric tension of the fog-shrouded night scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement alongside a weathered wooden house, shifting from a view of the upper architecture to the ground-level details of the home. It begins by gliding past the steep roof overhang and a dormer window, while bare tree branches loom through a dense, silent fog on the left. As the camera maintains its steady forward pace, the upper structures gradually exit the frame to reveal the house's lower floor. The scene then opens up to show three white-framed windows and a vertical drainpipe, while the surrounding forest branches draw closer through the heavy mist. Finally, the movement continues in a slow, atmospheric line, deepening the eerie tension of the fog-shrouded night.
